{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7584748458052010776","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"游戏内容直播和现实，每个的占比让我感觉很舒服。每个朝代的不同呈现也很精彩，我这种知道历史的看描写都有点想玩😂保持节奏，写好每一个内容，会是一个很不错的作品(๑•̀ㅂ•́)و✧加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765965935,"group_id":"7575869759124687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7naYGb9HoUM+KIEpVDBOSPw+o/ETewC0rczQaT6D3by","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776443760\u0026x-signature=a1IcshC0NWQIbtzfq2xAO0WKciQ%3D","user_id":"1865193836515438","user_name":"铁之国的郁布"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1865193836515438","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越者林枫来到历史断层的平行世界，创立洪荒游戏，凭借前世知识重现华夏史诗。从《大秦》到《汉武大帝》，他用极致沉浸的游戏震撼世界。当新作《三国鼎立》面临创作瓶颈时，他毅然选择最难的道路——以“乱世求生”为核心，让玩家从饥荒中的流民起步，在白骨露野的废墟里挣扎求生。当那句“苍天已死，黄天当立”响彻云霄，当英雄传奇与残酷现实激烈碰撞，一部颠覆传统的三国史诗就此展开。这是游戏与历史的完美融合，更是文明火种的重燃。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5908cfea5c1105b47063624bf793b5ec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"ws小丑","author_id":"","book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_name":"在没有历史的世界做历史游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#505050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2074人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":66,\"name\":\"洪荒\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66\u0026name=洪荒\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":500,\"name\":\"断层\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500\u0026name=断层\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575869766888342078","read_count":"2074","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"798531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"324","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,断层,洪荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/37e952f5f42939aa0477e9da56e53667~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779091693\u0026x-signature=9xcCQCbrYjM0VgX%2Fe3PxwVwadh4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109399674071","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"67"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10420,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12252,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2022},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602977953120961304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实我觉得还行，比番茄大部分书强，起码三观正，看这勤劳程度也非常值得鼓励，但感觉看的人不多，希望作者能坚持写完"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770209508,"group_id":"7575869759124687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx/5J ":"","word_number":"798531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"324","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,断层,洪荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/37e952f5f42939aa0477e9da56e53667~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779091693\u0026x-signature=9xcCQCbrYjM0VgX%2Fe3PxwVwadh4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109399674071","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9234,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9405,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1517},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1766396570,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608411141862048536","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，跟其他这类文相比颇有新意，不是单纯的抄完历史就让玩家感到震惊，而是认真思考了游戏模式，感觉上来讲更真实。准确点讲更有质感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771474493,"group_id":"7575869759124687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小学生及作家一一一一","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2mPW/UZSTpCiiv0PsANoT2hH8fqxFwp6sgnpbk5KBHM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/af48c9930d2e464cb188e011c351add9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776447012\u0026x-signature=N8DZRpmf7WBEWWPn763nE8lkGYg%3D","user_id":"3650824808446381","user_name":"一只雪参"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3650824808446381","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越者林枫来到历史断层的平行世界，创立洪荒游戏，凭借前世知识重现华夏史诗。从《大秦》到《汉武大帝》，他用极致沉浸的游戏震撼世界。当新作《三国鼎立》面临创作瓶颈时，他毅然选择最难的道路——以“乱世求生”为核心，让玩家从饥荒中的流民起步，在白骨露野的废墟里挣扎求生。当那句“苍天已死，黄天当立”响彻云霄，当英雄传奇与残酷现实激烈碰撞，一部颠覆传统的三国史诗就此展开。这是游戏与历史的完美融合，更是文明火种的重燃。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5908cfea5c1105b47063624bf793b5ec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"ws小丑","author_id":"","book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_name":"在没有历史的世界做历史游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#505050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2074人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":66,\"name\":\"洪荒\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66\u0026name=洪荒\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":500,\"name\":\"断层\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500\u0026name=断层\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575869766888342078","read_count":"2074","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"798531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"324","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,断层,洪荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/37e952f5f42939aa0477e9da56e53667~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779091693\u0026x-signature=9xcCQCbrYjM0VgX%2Fe3PxwVwadh4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109399674071","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"329"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36766,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771669563,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597052604847932185","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我属于是上班听书类型的，所以书里很多细节都知道，这本书整体在历史跟游戏上我挺喜欢的、写的很不错，这游戏方面也很有创新。不过缺点也是有的，主要是在于男主跟前女友那方面，比如遇到难题就给前女友打电话。其他方面毒点倒是没有多少，而且作者也不是那种两耳不闻窗外事的类型，四星给上。[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768830262,"group_id":"7575869759124687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为什么这样子
